name: parsly-mcp
description: Give your AI agent a browser. Parsly connects Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT to a Chrome extension that extracts structured data from any website — Instagram profiles, Reddit threads, LinkedIn posts, product listings, and more. No scraping infrastructure required.

tools.name: parsley_list_operations
tools.description: List all available browser automation operations with their descriptions and parameters

tools.name: parsley_run_operation
tools.description: Run an operation on a URL and return structured data extracted from the page

tools.name: parsley_get_status
tools.description: Check whether the Parsly Chrome extension is connected and ready
